action.description:
Introduced by Senators Spreitzer, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Wirch and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Haywood, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, J. Jacobson, Joers, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs, Taylor and Udell
